category_sources: Official pandocomatic manual describes it as a tool for reusing pandoc configurations and converting documents.
source_facts.description says it automates the use of pandoc.
display_name_sources: Official heerdebeer.org manual title is Pandocomatic.
docs_sources: Official heerdebeer.org Pandocomatic page is a full manual with installation, quick start, and reference chapters.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/htdebeer/pandocomatic; per instructions, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official Pandocomatic manual describes templates, YAML configuration, command-line use, and directory conversion.
